params.name: originIataCode
params.description: airport code, following [IATA standard](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx), from which the traveler will depart

params.name: destinationIataCode
params.description: airport code, following [IATA standard](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx), to which the traveler is going.

params.name: departureDate
params.description:
The date on which the traveler will depart from the origin to go to the destination. 

Dates are specified in the[ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: currencyCode
params.description: the preferred currency for display. Currency is specified in the [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217) format, e.g. EUR for Euro

params.name: oneWay
params.description:
true to get price metrics for a one way trip,
false to get price metrics for a round trip
